description: Create packages/agent-tooling CE workspace package (build config, exports, added to npm workspaces)
Move ChatApiRegistryEntry / registry schema types into agent-tooling (pure types)
Move ranked search (searchRegistryEntries) into agent-tooling, dependency-free
Add request-building module: registry entry + args -> {method, path, query, headers, body} with path-param substitution and read/mutation classification
Add the 3 meta-tool definition schemas (search_api_registry, search_business_data, call_api_endpoint) with edition-templated descriptions; drop finish_response
Generalize registry generator to emit BOTH CE and EE registries from alga-openapi.ce.json / .ee.json
Re-point EE chat assistant (chatCompletionsService) to import registry/search/tool-defs from agent-tooling
Keep temp-key-from-session dispatch in EE chat (not moved to the shared package); package exposes request-building only
Add GET /api/v1/meta/mcp-registry returning the instance's edition registry (gzipped)
Auth-guard the registry endpoint (requires valid API key; 401 without)
Registry endpoint is edition-aware via isEnterpriseEdition() (serves CE or EE registry)
Scaffold @alga/mcp-connector package: Node, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk StdioServerTransport, npx-runnable bin
Connector config from ALGA_INSTANCE_URL + ALGA_API_TOKEN env vars; fail-fast with clear message if missing
Connector startup: fetch registry from instance meta/mcp-registry, hold in memory; clear error on fetch failure
Implement search_api_registry tool -> in-memory ranked search over fetched registry
Implement search_business_data tool -> GET /api/v1/search with user token
Implement call_api_endpoint tool -> build request from registry entry + send to /api/v1 with user token
Map API failures (4xx/5xx) to structured MCP tool errors (not thrown) so the model can recover
Clear 401 handling instructing the user to reconfigure their token
README + MCP client config snippets for Claude Desktop and Cursor
End-to-end: user drives AlgaPSA (list + read + simple mutation) from Claude Desktop under their own permissions
Add /api/mcp Streamable HTTP endpoint via SDK StreamableHTTPServerTransport, EE-gated (no HTTP+SSE)
Expose the 3 meta-tools over the remote transport reusing agent-tooling
OAuth 2.1 resource server: advertise .well-known/oauth-protected-resource metadata
OAuth 2.1 authorization-code + PKCE flow; AlgaPSA acts as / fronts the authorization server
Dynamic Client Registration support for MCP clients
Extend AuthorizationSubject with agentId + subject type 'agent'
Admin provisioning of agent identities per tenant (create/list/revoke)
Resolve OAuth token -> agent subject per request
Per-agent permission assignment reusing existing RBAC roles
Remote dispatch through authz kernel under agent subject (reads auto-execute; mutations permission-gated)
Audit every agent tool invocation to audit_logs (identity, tool, inputs, policy decision, result, timestamp)
Audit export of agent actions
End-to-end: admin stands up remote server, client connects over OAuth, actions attributable + audited
Add agent subject type to kernel bundle/narrowing policy evaluation (agent-specific ABAC)
Policy authoring for agents (which tools / resources / conditions)
Approval holding queue: data model + persistence for gated mutations
Approve/reject UI for held agent actions
Timeout policy for held approvals
DESIGN SPIKE (deferred): approval-resolution mechanism over Streamable HTTP request/response (pending_approval handle vs check_approval tool vs streamed result)
Per-agent and per-tenant quotas / rate limits extending enforceApiRateLimit; structured to feed metered usage later
SSO-bound agent identity via the tenant IdP
End-to-end: policy restricts agent to read-only billing + requires approval for bulk ticket close + exportable audit trail
